product: Databricks Runtime 19 will use a unified release model
tagline: Starting with version 19, Databricks Runtime will use a unified release model.
what_it_does: Starting with version 19, Databricks Runtime will use a unified release model. Instead of multiple feature versions (for example, 19.0, 19.1, 19.2), each major version will have a single release notes page. After an initial Beta, each Databricks Runtime version will launch as generally available (GA) and receive new features and fixes approximately weekly, with updates differentiated by date on a single page.
why_it_matters: Reduces operational overhead and unlocks new capabilities for data teams on Databricks.
key_takeaway: Starting with version 19, Databricks Runtime will use a unified release model.
